2606.17888.title: MathVis-Fine: Aligning Visual Supervision with Necessity via Progressive Dependency-Guided Training for Multimodal Mathematical Reasoning
2606.17888.paper_summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has extended from purely linguistic domains to multimodal scenarios; however, existing approaches often treat visual inputs as homogeneous or auxiliary signals, failing to capture the intricate and sample-specific dependencies between text and images in mathematical problem-solving. This gives rise to two core issues: first, the supervisory signals for visual content are generalized and coarse-grained, lacking adaptation to the actual necessity of visual information in each sample; second, training feedback becomes inaccurate when visual rewards are uniformly applied without distinguishing the complementary relationships among inputs. These limitations hinder models from achieving precise multimodal reasoning. In this work, we propose a framework for modeling fine-grained visual dependencies in mathematical reasoning. We first construct the MathVis-Fine dataset, augmenting fine-grained visual annotations with visual dependency ratings. Building upon this dataset, we introduce a two-stage progressive visual enhancement training paradigm that balances answer correctness rewards and visual grounding rewards according to the intrinsic visual dependency level of each sample, thereby mitigating reward bias and improving supervision accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the MathVis-Fine framework effectively enhances visual perception progressively based on visual dependency, offering a more precise training framework for multimodal mathematical reasoning. We will release the dataset upon acceptance.
2606.17888.paper_summary_zh: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 推理已經從純粹的語言領域擴展到多模態場景；然而，現有的方法往往將視覺輸入視為同質或輔助信號，未能捕捉在數學問題解決中文本與圖像之間錯綜複雜且特定樣本的依賴關係。<lb/>這引發了兩個核心問題：首先，視覺內容的監督信號是一般化和粗糙的，缺乏對每個樣本中視覺信息實際需求的適應；其次，當視覺獎勵在不區分輸入之間互補關係的情況下統一應用時，訓練反饋變得不準確。<lb/>這些限制阻礙了模型實現精確的多模態推理。<lb/>在本研究中，我們提出了一個框架，用於建模數學推理中的細粒度視覺依賴性。<lb/>我們首先構建了 MathVis-Fine 數據集，增強了細粒度的視覺註釋和視覺依賴評分。<lb/>基於這個數據集，我們引入了一種兩階段的漸進式視覺增強訓練範式，根據每個樣本的內在視覺依賴水平平衡答案正確性獎勵和視覺基礎獎勵，從而減輕獎勵偏差並提高監督準確性。<lb/>大量實驗證明，MathVis-Fine 框架有效地根據視覺依賴性逐步增強視覺感知，為多模態數學推理提供了更精確的訓練框架。<lb/>我們將在接受後發布該數據集。
2606.17888.author: Wanshi Xu et.al.
2606.17888.authors: Wanshi Xu, Haokun Zhao, Haidong Yuan, Songjun Cao, Long Ma
